It was directed by Antón Vilar.
HasA: It has a strong regional flavour in Galicia.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by a reaction to the increased centralization of the Spanish State.
It is characterized by the apparition of modern Galician nationalism.
It is characterized by the promotion of Galician culture.
It is characterized by the promotion of Galician language.
It is characterized by the cause of Marxism.
It is characterized by the ideological cornerstone of Alfonso Daniel Rodríguez Castelao's classic work Sempre en Galiza.
It is characterized by moderate regionalism.
It is characterized by claims for independence.
Influenced: It influenced the Galician People's Union.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the French model of nation-state.
IsA: It is a regionalist political movement.

It is a reaction to the increased centralization of the Spanish State.
It is a visible act of resistance.
KnownFor: It is known for the promotion of Galician culture.
It is known for the promotion of Galician language.
LocatedIn: It is located in Galicia, Spain.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the Spanish Civil War.
OccurredIn: It occurred in Galicia, Spain.

It occurred in December 1932.
It occurred in 1937.
It occurred in 1939.
It occurred in 1950.
It occurred in 1975.
It occurred in 1978.
OccurredAround: It occurred around the mid-nineteenth century.
PartOf: It is part of the Spanish State.
UsedFor: It is used for the promotion of Galician culture.
It is used for the promotion of Galician language.
UsedIn: It is used in Galicia, Spain.
UsedTo: It is used to eradicate internal administrative differences.
It is used to eradicate cultural differences.
